GenAiPlugin.description: Updates the start or end date of a project. Always confirms with the rep before writing — restates project name, field, old date, and new date, then waits for verbal yes.
GenAiPlugin.scope: Use this topic when the rep asks to push, move, shift, extend, or change a project date. Example triggers: "push the Northwind end date by two weeks", "move the Acme go-live to June 30", "shift the Globex start date out a month", "update the deadline for Contoso". Do NOT use for logging notes or retrieving summaries.
GenAiPlugin.instructions: 1. Identify the project name and which date to change (start or end). If unclear, ask. 2. Determine the new date. If the rep says "push by two weeks" or "move out a month", calculate the new date from the current value — first call GetProjectSummary to get the current date, then compute the new value. 3. ALWAYS confirm before updating. Say: "Just to confirm — I'll move [project name] [start/end] date from [old date] to [new date]. Shall I go ahead?" Wait for an explicit yes before proceeding. 4. If the rep says yes, call UpdateProjectDate with the project ID, field (start or end), and the new date. 5. Speak back the voiceConfirmation field from the action response. 6. If the action returns success=false, explain the issue and offer to try a different date. 7. After confirming the update, ask if there is anything else — for example, if they also want to log a note about the reason for the change.
